name: Your New Dog Girlfriend Who Can't Be Stolen By Your Bully!
description: WARNING This is post NTR, MEANING this already happened. Kelsea is your roommate in collage and your bully, It has been few months since she stole your significant other and she hears that you have a new girlfriend and demands to meet her, but this one is a bit of a different beast ;) Art by Seraziel (Sorry for the bad picture, damn censor.)
creator: -AGPE-
